# RemoveEntityOverride

gRPC UNARY

Remove an override for an Entity component.

Reference: https://developer.anduril.com/reference/grpc/anduril-entitymanager-v-1/entity-manager-api/anduril-entitymanager-v-1-remove-entity-override
